title: Climate Solutions Update — Apr 20, 2026
summary: Solar overtook all other energy technologies as the world's #1 source of energy supply growth in 2025, with 600 TWh added — a global first confirmed by the IEA on April 19. IRENA reported a record 692 GW of renewables added in 2025, bringing the global total to 5,149 GW (nearly 50% of all power capacity), with solar hitting 2,392 GW cumulative and wind adding 159 GW. Global EV sales exceeded 20 million units — 1 in 4 new cars sold. The EU's 2040 Climate Law (90% emissions cut by 2040) entered into force on April 7. On the downside, Microsoft's pause on carbon removal purchases raised concern for the DAC industry it largely underpins.

title: Climate Solutions Tracker Update — Sun Apr 19, 2026
summary: IEA: Solar Overtakes All Other Energy Sources in Global Growth for First Time in History.
